Subject: Hi!
Message:
Hi Paul,
Hope you had an awesome Friday.   I just realized that I think I told you 
the wrong person in the picture was me!  Did I say the one on the left?  I 
meant the one on the right!  I will send you one of just me so ya know for 
sure!  I'm going to be at a birthday party tonight & I'll have one taken!
Hope to talk to ya later...
Laurann
